research_notes: 代表取締役 萩原一成, 取締役 萩原加代, 監査役 松江泰弘 found on /aboutus/outline/ page. 取締役相談役 萩原成美 (retired advisor) mentioned in 2021 history. Founded 1990 in Yokosuka, 10 employees, focused on mobile communications testing and accounting system development. Member of KIA and YRP. No LinkedIn or Twitter/X links found.
